content:
🔥 BubbleLab | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a self-hostable and extensible workflow engine for automating operational tasks, building custom agents, and integrating with various systems.
✨ Key Features: • Workflow execution runtime • Agent and integration primitives ("Bubbles") • Local workflow studio • Execution tracing, logging, and observability • CLI tooling
📖 Summary: Bubble Lab is an open-core workflow engine that powers its own AI operator platform. It allows teams to automate operational tasks directly within Slack using an AI assistant named Pearl, and can be run, hosted, and extended independently for custom automation needs.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
